summary: Surah At-Talaq details rulings of divorce: observe waiting periods (including for those past menstruation and those who have not menstruated), housing and provisions, fair dealings, witnesses, and rights of pregnant and nursing mothers. It stresses that piety brings a way out and unexpected provision, and that Allah has set a measure for all things. It warns rebellious towns, calls the Prophet a ‘Reminder,’ and affirms Allah’s power over seven heavens and seven earths.
